prompt: I just finished running the autopatch benchmark with Claude 3.5 Sonnet on the ARVO-Lite 15-case dataset. The stats file is at /tmp/eval_data/stats.json and the per-case reports are at /tmp/eval_data/patch_gen_reports.json. Can you analyze these results and generate a LaTeX results table for the paper? Save it to paper/tables/ in the usual format.

assertions.description: A LaTeX table file is created at paper/tables/results_main.tex
The table has a \label{} command for cross-referencing
The table has a \caption{} with meaningful text
Key numbers from stats.json appear correctly (e.g., 0.692 or 69.2 for Tier 1 rate)
Output includes a reminder to push to Overleaf via git
